New HSK 1 Vocabulary: Your First 500 Chinese Words!

In Beginner Tutorials, NEW HSK 3.0, Practical Chinese Phrases by Angel HuangJuly 28, 2022

HSK is the most widely used Chinese Proficiency test in the world.

As per the latest standards (HSK 3.0), it consists of 9 different levels. 

In this post we go over ALL of the 500 Chinese words included in the New HSK level 1.  

If you're looking to learn your first 500 Chinese vocabulary words, this list from the New Standard level 1 is a great place to start 🙂

NEW HSK 1 Full Vocabulary Words (HSK 3.0)

No

Chinese

Pinyin

English

1

爱

ài

love

2

爱好

ài hào

hobby

3

八

bā

eight

4

爸爸 / 爸

bà ba / bà

dad

5

吧

ba

Interjection particle

6

白

bái 

white

7

白天

bái tiān

daytime

8

百

bǎi

hundred

9

班

bān

class

10

半

bàn

half

11

半年

bàn nián

half a year

12

半天

bàn tiān

half day

13

帮

bāng

help

14

帮忙

bāng máng

help

15

包

bāo

bag

16

包子

bāo zi

bun

17

杯

bēi

cup

18

杯子

bēi zi

cup

19

北

běi

north

20

北边

běi biān

North side

21

北京

běi jīng

Beijing

22

本

běn 

measure word for books 

23

本子

běn zi

notebook

24

比

bǐ

particle used for comparison

25

别

bié

don’t

26

别的

bié de

other

27

别人

bié rén

other people

28

病

bìng

disease

29

病人

bìng rén

patient

30

不大

bú dà

not big

31

不对

bú duì

wrong

32

不客气

bú kè qi

You’re welcome

33

不用

bú yòng

No need to

34

不

bù

No

35

菜

cài

dish

36

茶

chá

tea

37

差

chà

differ from / bad / short of 

38

常

cháng

often

39

常常

cháng cháng

often

40

唱

chàng

sing

41

唱歌

chàng gē

sing

42

车

chē

car

43

车票

chē piào

ticket

44

车上

chē shang

in the car

45

车站

chē zhàn

station

46

吃

chī

eat

47

吃饭

chī fàn

have a meal

48

出

chū

out

49

出来

chū lái

come out

50

出去

chū qù

go out

51

穿

chuān

wear

52

床

chuáng

bed

53

次

cì 

measure word for times, frequency

54

从

cóng

from

55

错

cuò

wrong

56

打

dǎ 

hit / take

57

打车

dǎ chē

take a taxi

58

打电话

dǎ diàn huà

make a phone call

59

打开

dǎ kāi

turn on

60

打球

dǎ qiú

play ball

61

大

dà

large / big

62

大学

dà xué

university

63

大学生

dà xué shēng

university student

64

到

dào

arrive

65

得到

dé dào

get

66

地

de

Structural Particle: most often used before a verb

or an adjective

67

的

de

Structural Particle: most often used for modifying nouns

68

等

děng

wait

69

地

dì

ground

70

地点

dì diǎn

location

71

地方

dì fang

place

72

地上

dì shàng

on the ground

73

地图

dì tú

Map

74

弟弟 / 弟

dì di / dì

younger brother

75

第...

dì…

Prefix for ordinal numbers, 

e.g. first（第一 dì yī）, second（第二 dì èr ） etc

76

点

diǎn

point / dot / o'clock 

77

电

diàn

electricity

78

电话

diàn huà

phone

79

电脑

diàn nǎo

computer

80

电视

diàn shì

television

81

电视机

diàn shì jī

Television

lit. "television + machine"

82

电影

diànyǐng

movie

83

电影院

diàn yǐng yuàn

cinema / movie theater

84

东

dōng

east

85

东边

dōng bian

east side

86

东西

dōng xi

thing

87

动

dòng

move

88

动作

dòng zuò

action

89

都

dōu

all

90

读

dú

read

91

读书

dú shū

reading / study

92

对

duì

right

93

对不起

duì bu qǐ

I'm sorry. / sorry

94

多

duō

many / much / more

95

多少

duō shao

how much

96

饿

è

hungry

97

儿子

ér zi

son

98

二

èr

two

99

饭

fàn

rice / meal

100

饭店

fàndiàn

restaurant

101

房间

fángjiān

room

102

房子

fáng zi

house / building

103

放

fàng

to put / to release / to let go

104

放假

fàng jià

holiday / have a holiday

105

放学

fàng xué

finish school / after school

106

飞

fēi

fly

107

飞机

fēijī

plane

108

非常

fēi cháng

very

109

分

fēn

minute / point / part

measure word

110

风

fēng

wind

111

干

gān

dry

112

干净

gānjìng

clean

113

干

gàn

do

114

干什么

gàn shén me

What to do / 

What are you doing?

115

高

gāo

high

116

高兴

gāo xìng

happy

117

告诉

gào su

tell

118

哥哥 / 哥

gē ge / gē

elder brother

119

歌

gē

song

120

个

gè

measure word

(classifier for people or objects in general)

121

给

gěi

give

122

跟

gēn

with

123

工人

gōng rén

worker

124

工作

gōng zuò

work

125

关

guān

shut / close / turn off

126

关上

guān shang

close / turn off

127

贵

guì

noble / expensive

128

国

guó

country / state / nation

129

国家

guó jiā

country

130

国外

guó wài

foreign / abroad

131

过

guò

pass

132

还

hái

also / still / yet

133

还是

hái shi

still / or

134

还有

hái yǒu

also / in addition / besides

135

孩子

háizi

children

136

汉语

hànyǔ

Mandarin Chinese (language)

137

汉字

hàn zì

Chinese character

138

好

hǎo

good

139

好吃

hǎo chī

tasty / delicious

140

好看

hǎo kàn

good looking

141

好听

hǎo tīng

pleasant to hear

142

hǎo wánr

143

hào

number / date

144

hē

drink

145

hé

and

146

hěn

very

147

后

hòu

back / behind / after / later

148

hòu bian

behind / back

149

后天

hòu tiān

the day after tomorrow

150

花

huā

flower

151

huà

152

坏

huài

bad

153

还

huán

return / pay back

回

huí

go back / return

回答

huídá

answer

156

回到

huí dào

back to / return to

157

回家

huí jiā

go home / return home

158

回来

huí lái

come back / return

回去

huí qù

go back

160

会

huì

can; be able to

161

火车

huǒ chē

train

162

机场

jīchǎng

airport

163

机票

jī piào

air ticket

164

鸡蛋

jī dàn

egg

165

几

jǐ

several / how many / how much 

166

记

jì

to record / to note

167

记得

jì de

remember

168

记住

jì zhù

remember / keep in mind

169

家

jiā

home

170

jiā lǐ

171

家人

jiā rén

family / family member

172

间

jiān

between /

measure word for rooms

173

见

jiàn

see / meet

174

见面

jiàn miàn

to meet / to see each other 

175

教

jiāo

teach

176

叫

jiào

call / to be called

177

jiào xué lóu

178

jiě jie / jiě

179

jiè shào

introduce

180

今年

jīn nián

181

jīn tiān

182

kāi

189

190

kāi huì

191

192

看

kàn

193

kàn bìng

194

kàn dào

see

195

196

198

kě

199

kè

course

kè běn

201

text

202

kǒu

203

kuài

piece /

204

kuài

lái

206

lái dào

207

lǎo

208

lǎo rén

209

lǎo shī

teacher

210

了

le

particle (indicates the completion of an action or a change of state, etc)

211

累

lèi

tired

212

冷

lěng

cold

213

里

lǐ

in

214

里边

lǐ biān

inside

215

两

liǎng

two

216

零

líng 

zero

217

六

liù

six

218

楼

lóu

floor

219

楼上

lóu shàng

upstairs

220

楼下

lóu xià

downstairs

221

路

lù

road

222

路口

lù kǒu

intersection / crossing

223

路上

lù shang

on the road

224

妈妈 / 妈

mā ma / mā

mom / mother

225

马路

mǎ lù

road / street

226

马上

mǎ shàng

right away / immediately 

227

吗

ma

question particle

228

买

mǎi

buy

229

慢

màn

slow

230

忙

máng

busy

231

毛

máo

a fractional unit of money in China

1 毛 = 10 cents

232

没

méi

not / didn't

233

没关系

méi guān xi

It doesn't matter

234

没什么

méi shén me

It’s nothing

235

没事儿

méi shìr

It's okay / It's all rigtht.

236

没有

méi yǒu

to not have / there is no

237

妹妹 / 妹

mèi mei / mèi

younger sister

238

门

mén

door

239

门口

mén kǒu

doorway

240

门票

mén piào

tickets

241

们

men 

plural marker

e.g. 朋友们 péng you men (friends)，老师们 lǎo shī men (teachers)

242

米饭

mǐ fàn

cooked rice

243

miàn bāo

bread

244

miàn tiáor

noodles

245

míng zi

name

246

míng nián

next year

248

明天

míng tiān

tomorrow

249

ná

250

nǎ

which

254

nà

nà lǐ

there

nàr

258

nǎi

爷爷

yé ye

grandpa

425

也

yě

also

426

页

yè

page

427

一

yī

one

428

衣服

yī fu

clothes

429

医生

yī shēng

doctor

430

医院

yī yuàn

hospital

431

一半

yí bàn

half

432

一会儿

yí huìr

a moment / a little while / in a moment

433

一块儿

yí kuàir

together

434

一下儿

yí xiàr

(used after a verb) give it a go / 

to do (sth for a bit to give it a try)

435

一样

yí yàng

the same / equally

436

一边

yì biān

one side

437

一点儿

yī diǎnr

a little bit

438

一起

yì qǐ

together

439

一些

yì xiē

some

440

用

yòng

use

441

有

yǒu

have

442

有的

yǒu de

some

443

有名

yǒu míng

famous

444

有时候 / 有时

yǒu shí hou / yǒu shí

sometimes

445

有（一）些

yǒu （ yì ） xiē

some

446

有用

yǒu yòng

useful

447

右

yòu

right

448

右边

yòu bian

right side / right

449

雨

yǔ

rain

450

元

yuán

currency unit

(esp. Chinese yuan) 

451

远

yuǎn

far

452

月

yuè

month

453

再

zài

again

454

再见

zài jiàn

goodbye

455

在

zài

at / in

456

在家

zài jiā

at home

457

早

zǎo

early

458

早饭

zǎo fàn

breakfast

459

早上

zǎo shang

morning

460

怎么

zěn me

how

461

站

zhàn

station / stand

462

找

zhǎo

look for

463

找到

zhǎo dào

find

464

这

zhè

this / here

465

这边

zhè biān

this side / here

466

这里

zhè lǐ

here

467

这儿

zhèr

here

468

这些

zhè xiē

these

469

着

zhe

particle: in process of

(indicating action in progress)

470

真

zhēn

really

471

真的

zhēn de

true / real

472

正

zhèng

just / exactly

473

正在

zhèng zài

in process of (doing sth) / 

just at (that time) / right in (that place) 

474

知道

zhī dào

know

475

知识

zhīshi

knowledge

476

中

zhōng

middle / in

477

中国

zhōng guó

China

478

中间

zhōng jiān

middle

479

中文

zhōng wén

Chinese (language)

480

中午

zhōng wǔ

noon

481

中学

zhōng xué

middle school

482

中学生

zhōng xué shēng

middle School student

483

重

zhòng

heavy

484

重要

zhòng yào

important

485

住

zhù

live

486

准备

zhǔn bèi

get ready / prepare

487

桌子

zhuō zi

table / desk

488

字

zì

word / character

489

子

zi 

noun suffix

e.g. 桌子 zhuō zi (table) 椅子 yǐ zi (chair)

490

走

zǒu

go / walk

491

走路

zǒu lù

walk / take a walk

492

最

zuì

most

493

最好

zuì hǎo

best

494

最后

zuì hòu

last

495

昨天

zuó tiān

yesterday

496

左

zuǒ

left

497

左边

zuǒ bian

left side

498

坐

zuò

sit

499

坐下

zuò xia

sit down

500

做

zuò

do
